ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commands" (
  "command_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the command belongs to */,
  "command_name" TEXT /* Name of the command */,
  "bit_field" TEXT /* Bit field of the command */,
  "bit_position" INTEGER /* Bit position of the command */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the command */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the command */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commands_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the command */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_versions_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_parameters_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the command */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the command was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command the permission is for */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_categories" (
  "command_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command-category pair */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command-category pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command-category pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role pair */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team-member pair */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team-member pair was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the team-member pair was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "command_usage" (
  "command_usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each command usage entry */,
  "command_id" INTEGER /* ID of the command being used */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team using the command */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the command was used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command usage was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the command usage was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("command_usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_usage_command_id FOREIGN KEY ("command_id") REFERENCES commands ("command_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_command_usage_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
